# CANDIDATE: SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK_PARAM_OPT

**Filed:** 2026-06-08  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** filter_change  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We are optimizing the SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK parameters to improve engine performance on J winner days while avoiding losses on J loser days. The edge exists because default parameters may not capture explosive winner day moves or avoid whipsaws on loser days. The top keeper shows improved wide P&L but low J-specific edge capture.

## Mechanism

Entry triggers when: volume > vol_mult × 20-bar average volume, candle body ≥ body_min_cents, level break has ≥ min_stars, and strike is set at strike_offset from break level. Exit uses: premium stop at premium_stop_pct, first TP at tp1_premium_pct (selling 2/3 position), runner target at runner_target_pct, and no profit lock (profit_lock_threshold_pct=0, profit_lock_stop_offset_pct=0).

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** qty=10 requires $10K–$25K account (per position sizing schedule). $1K paper account realizes ~14% headline P&L (3 contracts max at $1K).
2. **Sample bias:** 16-month sweep; 5 keepers selected from unknown combo count. Selection based on edge_capture/wide_pnl. High overfit risk due to multi-parameter optimization without OOS validation.
3. **Out-of-sample:** NEEDS-OOS (no walk-forward held-out window performed).
4. **Real-fills:** NEEDS-REAL-FILLS (no validation of top 3 J days against realistic OPRA fills).
5. **Failure modes:** 
   - Worst day: 5/01 winner day missed opportunity ($0 vs expected $470). 
   - Max drawdown: unknown without full equity curve. 
   - Blow-up: overfit parameters may fail in regime shifts (e.g., low-vol environments).
6. **Concentration:** Requires daily P&L breakdown to compute top-5% concentration. Unknown -- requires Stage-1 backtest.

## Pre-merge gate

- Gym validators (70/70 PASS minimum)  
- Walk-forward OOS test (WF ratio ≥0.50)  
- Real-fills validation on top 3 J days (sim vs real OPRA diff <±20%)

## Confidence

3 / 10 -- Edge_capture (229.63) below OP-16 rejection threshold (771); no OOS/real-fills validation; high overfit risk from parameter sweep.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

Does not conflict with existing candidates (parameter optimization on existing SNIPER trigger). Unlikely to promote due to edge_capture <771. May complement SNIPER_VIX_TREND candidates if OOS validates improved J-edge capture. Current leaderboard SNIPER candidates (#13-15) are OP-16 inapplicable due to insufficient live anchors.
